kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: At least one of the artisan with 14 coins, the artisan with 18 coins, and the artisan with 20 coins belongs to the Ironmongers' Guild.
Either Aldric goes with Bridgegate or Fletcher goes with Highrow.
Either Edmund belongs to the River Ward or both members of the Clothiers' Guild belong to the River Ward (but not both).
12 coins goes with exactly two of Aldric, Mason, and Highrow.
Edmund, Godfrey, and Fletcher go with Riverside, 14 coins, and 16 coins, in some order.
At least one of Cedric and the Fletcher belongs to the South Side.
Edmund's levy is between the Mason and the artisan in Oldwall.
Godfrey goes with none of Fletcher, Tanner, or 18 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Cedric goes with 12 coins; Rowan goes with 22 coins; Mason goes with Millpond.
Cedric, Blacksmith, and Carpenter go with Highrow, Riverside, and Southgate, in some order.
At least one member of the South Side goes with (Cooper or Carpenter).

If either Mason goes with Bridgegate or someone in the Hill Ward goes with Carpenter (but not both), then Millpond goes with Blacksmith.
